title: SimpleCombatTime
description: Smooth Bossbar-based combat timer with logout protection.
body:
### ⚔️ SimpleCombatTime

**Lightweight and clean combat logging prevention plugin for modern Paper servers.**

SimpleCombatTime adds a smooth and reliable combat timer system that prevents players from escaping fights unfairly.  
When two players engage in combat, both enter combat mode and receive a decreasing Bossbar timer at the top of their screen.

If a player logs out during combat — they die.

No unnecessary features. No performance overhead. Just simple, clean and effective combat control.

---

## ✨ Features

• Smooth decreasing Bossbar combat timer  
• Fully customizable Bossbar title  
• Configurable Bossbar color  
• Command blocking during combat  
• Allowed commands whitelist  
• Kill on logout during combat  
• Fully customizable messages  
• Bypass permission support  
• Reload command  
• Lightweight and optimized  

---

## 🔐 Permissions

simplecombattime.bypass   - disables combat mode for player  
simplecombattime.reload   - allows config reload  

---

## 📜 Commands

/simplecombattime reload  
/sct reload  

---

## ⚙️ Supported Platforms

• Paper  
• Purpur  
• Pufferfish  
• Other Paper forks  

---

## 🎮 Supported Versions

**1.21 – 1.21.4**

---

SimpleCombatTime is designed to be simple, configurable and production-ready.  
Perfect for survival, factions, PvP and competitive servers.
